---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: michigan.scss
css: styles.css
lightbox: true
---


This new Winter 2026 class –– in collaboration with the University of Michigan Museum of Art –– explores political science and sociology research on how protests and social movements affect policy, focusing on 20th and 21st-century movements in the United States. We will examine the role of social movements in democracy, with a particular focus on the role of art in policy debates and social change. Applying theories of policy change to a cause of their choosing, students will create and curate movement art, culminating in an exhibition at the end of the semester.

This class will be a collaboration with UMMA staff and their [American Sampler](https://umma.umich.edu/exhibitions/american-sampler-activating-the-archive/) exhibit, and our class will meet at the museum during class time on several occasions throughout the semester.

::: {layout="[[1,1]]"}

![](figs/jan_2026_umma_2.jpg "Students view protest art at the American Sampler exhibit at UMMA")

![](figs/jan_2026_umma_1.jpg "Students view protest art at the American Sampler exhibit at UMMA")
:::

::: {layout="[[1,1,1]]"}

![Vernon Lewis Gallery](https://imgc.artprintimages.com/img/print/vernon-lewis-gallery-u-s-history-print-of-the-statue-of-liberty-holding-up-a-burning-draft-card-instead-of-her-torch_u-l-q1r5lx60.jpg "Print of the statue of liberty holding up a burning draft card - Vernon Lewis Gallery")
 
![FIEST (2020)](https://i.pinimg.com/originals/39/c3/cf/39c3cf5aee32886531e47808dfb4b44f.jpg "Black Lives Matter by FIEST (2020)")
 
![To Change Everything We Need Everyone poster by Shepard Fairey](https://sothebys-md.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/c727504/2147483647/strip/true/crop/1499x2000+0+0/resize/1024x1366!/quality/90/?url=http:%2F%2Fsothebys-brightspot.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fmedia-desk%2F57%2Fd8%2Fe26159f449af81d8fe2639095e2f%2F043n10541-blxsn-01.jpg "2014 People's Climate March poster showing the statue of liberty half underwater with the text To Change Everything We Need Everyone - March to Save the World NYC 9/21")

![Tea Party Rally - Getty](https://media.gettyimages.com/id/525595256/photo/members-and-supporters-of-the-tea-party-hold-a-rally-calling-for-the-repeal-of-president.jpg?s=612x612&w=0&k=20&c=VdAqWSU7ZdTmoYiRVJPbwXz9nyFl1eyRX9iXQZ4ToZk= "A photo of a Tea Party Rally featuring a man with a sign that reads No Kings, No Queens, No Dictators, No Obamacare")

![Gucci CHIME Zine curated by Kimberlé Crenshaw](https://vmagazine.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/BANNER-sayhername.jpg)

![](https://static.independent.co.uk/2024/03/08/05/SEI195031379.jpg "Marjorie Taylor-Greene's 'say her name' shirt at the 2024 State of the Union")

![Join or Die - Benjamin-Franklin](https://cdn.britannica.com/82/13582-004-473F0468/Benjamin-Franklin-Join-or-Die-cartoon-union-1754.jpg "A snake cut into pieces, labeled with states of the American colonies and the caption Join or Die")

![Gadsden Rainbow - flagsbythedozen.com](https://flagsbythedozen.com/cdn/shop/products/GadsdenRainbow.jpg "A ranbow flag with a snake and the words Don't Tread on Me")

![Don't Tread on Me Women's Gadsden Flag - Flags Importer](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51YXWstVdSL._SL500_.jpg "A snake in the shape of a uterus and the words Don't Tread on Me")^[See Dialectic of Enlightenment by Max Horkheimer and Theodor W. Adorno]

!["It Can't Happen Here" - Shepard Fairey](https://i0.wp.com/obeygiant.com/images/2026/01/It-Cant-Happen-18X24.jpg "The Statue of Liberty crying with the caption It Can't Happen Here" )

!["Migration is Beautiful" by Favianna Rodriguez](https://i0.wp.com/justseeds.org/wp-content/uploads/MigrationIsBeautiful2018_8in_1500-3.jpg "A colorful butterfly aztec faces and other patterns in the wings and the caption Migration is Beautiful" )

 ![One Nation Under God - WalMart.com](https://i5.walmartimages.com/seo/One-Nation-Under-God-Fourth-of-July-Shirt-Christian-American-Shirt-God-Bless-America-Pledge-Of-Allegiance-Independence-Day-Tee-Patriotic-Tee_0818676f-8c85-4dbe-b394-80acbdb527ba.c87ba2bc391dbfb98e2ecd4e4208fdc5.jpeg "A tee shirt with a cross over an abstract american flag and text reading One Nation Under God - WalMart.com")

![Refugees Crossing the Border Wall into South Texas by Rigoberto Gonzalez - Smithsonian](https://npr.brightspotcdn.com/dims3/default/strip/false/crop/2477x2910+0+0/resize/1200/quality/85/format/webp/?url=http%3A%2F%2Fnpr-brightspot.s3.amazonaws.com%2F65%2F4f%2F71a0629d42c38abf6f007db187a6%2Fgonzalez-painting-hig-res.jpg "A painting of Refugees Crossing the Border Wall into South Texas")

![Education makes American Great (2017) by David Hays](https://www.yesmagazine.org/wp-content/uploads/imports/ad95049b3b3a41cab7fb49c82eefd803.jpg "Education makes American Great (2017) by David Hays - CAN collection")

![Trans Forming Liberty by Amy Sherald - Smithsonian](https://npr.brightspotcdn.com/dims3/default/strip/false/crop/800x1297+0+0/resize/300/quality/85/format/webp/?url=http%3A%2F%2Fnpr-brightspot.s3.amazonaws.com%2F6a%2F83%2Feaf7a0cf4de78a6c18e4c017753c%2Fsherald-painting-smithsonian.jpg "A painting of a trans woman with pink hair and a blue gown, holding a torch in the pose of the statue of liberty")

![The Immokalee Statue of Liberty - Coalición de Trabajadores de Immokalee o CIW - Smithsonian](https://www.whitehouse.gov/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/NMAH-JN2015-8136.jpg "Statue of Liberty “holding a tomato in her right hand instead of a torch, and a basket of tomatoes in her left hand instead of a tablet. Esta estatua de la libertad, hecha por la Coalición de Trabajadores de Immokalee o CIW (por sus siglas en ingles) en 2000, fue llevada a una marcha de 230 millas por la dignidad, el diálogo y un salario justo.")


![My Dreams Are Not Illegal - Smithsonian](https://www.whitehouse.gov/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/My-Dreams-Are-Not-Illegal.png "A woman with monarch butterflies in her afro and text reading My Dreams Are Not Illegal")

![Miss America’s Favorite Son - Shepard Fairey ](https://i0.wp.com/obeygiant.com/images/2026/02/Miss-Americas-FAVORITE-SON-18x24-1.jpg "A woman cradeling a gun with the caption This is my Favorite son. I love all of my children, but I will sacrifice them to protect my favorite son.")

![Abandon Punishment - Roger Peet](https://justseeds.org/wp-content/uploads/abandonpunishment_1500.jpg "Abandon Punishment poster showing a tree growing out of a jail window")

![Farms not Factories - Shepard Fairey](https://i0.wp.com/obeygiant.com/images/2025/09/Farm-Aid-2025-18x24-1.jpg?fit=600%2C800&ssl=1 "A print of a farm and a sign that says Farms not Factories")

![Tacking Back Resourcees - Sanya Hyland, 2020](https://i0.wp.com/justseeds.org/wp-content/uploads/28-Sanya-Hyland-Taking-Back-Resources1-1500.jpg?ssl=1 "A poster about taking money from the rich for social goods")

![](https://culturalpolitics.net/index/sites/default/files/inline-images/labor%20union%20women.jpg "Labor movement poster reading equal pay for equal work regardless of gender, race, religion or sexual orientation. Unions Build This.")

![](https://culturalpolitics.net/index/sites/default/files/inline-images/labor%20movement.jpg "Labor movement poster quoting Fredrick Douglas - Power Concedess Nothing Without a Demand. It never did and it never will.")

![Rosie the Riveter (1943) by Norman Rockwell](https://www.artchive.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Rosie-the-Riveter-Rockwell-Norman-1943-2.jpg "Rosie the Riveter (1943) by Norman Rockwell")

![We can do it! - CAN collection](https://creativeaction.network/cdn/shop/articles/We-Can-Do-It-Grid_c4042fd5-143e-4a9f-86ec-3ff8f9e728f3_2048x.jpg "We can do it! poster - CAN collection")

![Focus on the Family Pro-Life Signs](https://www.focusonthefamily.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/Screen-Shot-2023-03-24-at-9.35.10-AM.png "Focus on the Family Pro-Life Signs")

![Students for Life of America, University of North Texas Chapter](https://studentsforlife.org/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Screen-Shot-2023-10-23-at-1.53.26-PM-min.jpg "Chalk Art of a pregnant woman saying Love them Both")

![Never Again by BubbSnugg](https://image.spreadshirtmedia.com/image-server/v1/products/T1459A839PA3861PT28X8Y0D1025685656W8333H10000/views/1,width=1200,height=630,appearanceId=839,backgroundColor=F2F2F2/never-again-coat-hanger-pro-choice-is-pro-life-sticker.jpg "Never Again Coat Hanger Pro-Choice sticker by BubbSnugg")
<!--
![LGBT Buttons - National Museum of American History](https://americanhistory.si.edu/sites/default/files/styles/page_hero/public/blog_teaser_images/LGBT_Buttons_2.JPG)

![LGBT Buttons - National Museum of American History](https://americanhistory.si.edu/sites/default/files/styles/blog_image/public/LGBT_Buttons_1.JPG?itok=9R4MEyc7 "Three buttons reading Better Gay than Grumpy and My Unicorn is a Lesbian. Is Yours? and I'm Straight. But not Narrow")
--> 

![Memorial To A Marriage](https://npr.brightspotcdn.com/dims3/default/strip/false/crop/500x334+0+0/resize/400/quality/85/format/webp/?url=http%3A%2F%2Fnpr-brightspot.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fed%2F8e%2F796fb8f849f6bab0dd810f833fb6%2Fcronin-marriage.jpg)

![](https://thefederalist.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Screenshot-2026-03-19-at-9.57.12-PM-1200x675.png "A protest with signes read Require Voter ID")

![Latinos with disablities are diverse - Smithsonian](https://www.whitehouse.gov/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/latinx-diverse-web.jpg "A screenshot of a video showing two people, one in a dress and headscarf, the other in a suit with long hair and a beard with the text Latinos with disabilies are diverse.")

![SNCC Poster: Come Let Us Build A New World Together by Danny Lyon](https://umma.umich.edu/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Websize_SNCC_Danny-Lyon_come-let-us-build-a-new-world-together-617x485.jpg "SNCC Poster: Come Let Us Build A New World Together by Danny Lyon")

![School integration protest - Getty Images](https://judgelord.github.io/PP510/figs/brown.jpg "White men prostesting school integration. One sign reads Communists inflitrated our churches, no it inte grates our schools 2nd Peter 1-12")

![White supremeacist meme from the Website Edgy Memes and Fashy Dreams](https://www.tandfonline.com/cms/asset/381df6a8-34a5-4a92-bead-73305c1d5380/rjbs_a_1571935_f0002_oc.jpg "A meme reading civilization 200 years ago showing european city and all others as grass huts")

![Close-up of Deported Veterans Mural, Tijuana, Baja California. Photo by Sarah Leavitt/National Building Museum](https://nbm.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Close-up-of-Deported-Veterans-Mural-Tijuana-Baja-California-size-reduced-760x425.jpg "A mural with the words Freedom Peace Love Amor Paz and Libertad above hash tag UnMundo Sin Munos - One World Without Walls")


![Counterfit News by Kelli Anderson](https://farm4.static.flickr.com/3065/3025164416_5024b75e8c.jpg "A newspaper with the headline IRAQ WAR ENDS")
<!--
![Climate change protest - Alex Wong, Getty Images](https://media.gettyimages.com/id/92628097/photo/president-obama-meets-with-german-chancellor-merkel-in-the-oval-office.jpg "Cardboard heads of Obama nad Merkel with speech bubbles that say No you go first above a sign that says Climate Finance")
--> 

![A protest of deportations - Kevork Djansezian/Getty Images](https://static01.nyt.com/images/2012/06/16/us/JP-IMMIG-2/JP-IMMIG-2-jumbo.jpg "Young people sitting in a street with signs. One reads We are the future of america")

 ![Tea Party Protest - Wikipedia](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/6/62/Tea_Party_Protest_in_Dallas%2C_Texas_-_April%2C_2009.jpg "Tea Party Protest - Wikipedia")

![Government workers protest Gaza policy](https://www.theunitedwest.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/congressional-staff-protest-ceasefire.webp "Young people sitting with flowers and signs that read Congress your staff demands a ceasfire")
<!--

![Justice for janitors in San Francisco, Kristin Prentice for SEIU Local 87, 1995; Inkworks Press Archive](https://www.docspopuli.org/images/06_0726_079.jpg "Justice for janitors in San Francisco, Kristin Prentice for SEIU Local 87, 1995; Inkworks Press Archive.")



![We do mind dying, Doug Minkler, 1980; Cushing Archive.](https://www.docspopuli.org/images/07_0209_059.jpg "WE do mind dying, Doug Minkler, 1980; Cushing Archive.")

--> 

:::

::: {layout="[[1,1,1, 1]]"}

![Freedom of Speech by Norman Rockwell](https://rockwellfourfreedoms.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/FreedomofSpeech-sm-2.jpg "Freedom of Speech by Norman Rockwell")

![Fredom of Worship by Norman Rockwell](https://rockwellfourfreedoms.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/FreedomofWorship-sm-2.jpg "Fredom of Worship by Norman Rockwell")

![Freedom from Want by Norman Rockwell](https://rockwellfourfreedoms.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/FreedomfromWant-sm-2.jpg "Freedom from Want by Norman Rockwell")


![Freedom from Fear by Norman Rockwell](https://rockwellfourfreedoms.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/FreedomfromFear-sm-2.jpg "Freedom from Fear by Norman Rockwell")

<!--



![Protect yourself from this menace; IWW, circa 1921; Reuther Archive.](https://www.docspopuli.org/images/07_0510_041.jpg)

![I am somebody - together we are strong, United Farm Workers of America, circa 1977; Reuther Archive.](https://www.docspopuli.org/images/07_0510_035.jpg)


![There is no prejudice in kids unless adults put it there, UAW Fair Practices Department, circa 1963; Reuther Archive.](https://www.docspopuli.org/images/07_0510_008.jpg)

--> 


:::

![Varieties of Abundance - Niskanen Center](https://www.niskanencenter.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/Screenshot-2025-08-27-at-10.52.55-PM-1024x430.png "Varieties of Abundance - Niskanen Center")

![A detail from Diego Rivera’s Detroit Industry at the DIA. Photo: Getty Images](https://stories.vassar.edu/2016/assets/images/161116-hipsters-wall.jpg "A detail from Diego Rivera’s Detroit Industry at the DIA.")

![Coalition of Immokalee Workers mística theater at the March for Rights, Respect and Fair Food](https://monacaron.com/sites/default/files/styles/full_width_1006/public/CIW_MisticaTheater_0013_MonaCaron.jpg "Coalition of Immokalee Workers mística theater at the March for Rights, Respect and Fair Food")


<!--
::: {layout="[[1,1,1]]"}
![Cher Strauberry - Stevil Kinevil and Olivia Gibb](https://americanhistory.si.edu/sites/default/files/Broken%20Board-Update_0.jpg "A hot pink skateboard with a cartoon of a Cher Strauberry skating and cartoon stars behind her.")

![Unity - Jeff Cheung](https://americanhistory.si.edu/sites/default/files/Unity%20Board.jpg "This Unity Skateboarding deck is a wood maple laminate construction with a red deck surface. The bottom of the deck has a white ground with an original drawing from Unity Skateboarding founder Jeff Cheung.")

![Pave the Way - Miriam Stahl](https://ids.si.edu/ids/deliveryService?id=NMAH-ET2018-70758-000001 "This Pave the Way skate deck is a maple wood laminate with a green top surface. The bottom has a green and black checkerboard design throughout with well-known LGBTQ+ performers, athletes, and activists drawn by company co-founder Miriam Stahl.")
:::

--> 

<!--
![“wartime recruitment” - ICE’s New-Age Propaganda - The New Yorker](https://media.newyorker.com/photos/695d8f9a72aafd18e512ec43/2:2/w_2240,c_limit/NewYorker_ICEads_Final_animation_v2.gif "“wartime recruitment” - ICE’s New-Age Propaganda - The New Yorker")
--> 


{{< video https://vp.nyt.com/video/2022/04/18/100015_1_01sp-Musuems-portrait_wg_720p.mp4 title="El Muro/The Wall." >}}

El Muro/The Wall - Dana Tai Soon Burgess Dance Company
